from __future__ import annotations


def _coerce(value: int | str) -> str:
    if isinstance(value, int):
        return str(value)
    return value


def type_branch_and_mode_branch_compounded_in_same_function_negative(value: int | str, mode: str) -> str:
    text = _coerce(value)
    if mode == "upper":
        return text.upper()
    return text
